title: Full Mahaveer Plywood & Interiors Website Rebuild

requirements.text: Implement a white/gold luxury theme across the entire frontend with clean, premium aesthetics, gold accents, and mobile-responsive design consistent with the existing CSS token setup.

quotes: Clean white theme with gold accents

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use white backgrounds with gold accent colors
Typography uses Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text
Layout is fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Build the Hero section with a full-screen background image, company headline, subheadline, CTA buttons linking to the quote and gallery sections, and four trust-indicator cards showing 27+ years experience, 5000+ projects, satisfaction rating, and category count.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section renders full-screen with background image
CTA buttons scroll smoothly to quote and gallery sections
Four trust-indicator cards are visible on all screen sizes

requirements.text: Build the Services section showcasing six services: Plywood, Hardware, Laminates, Electrical, Paints, and Interiors — each with a service card containing image, title, description, feature list, and a 'Get Free Quote' button that scrolls to the quote section.

quotes: Services: Plywood, Hardware, Laminates, Electrical, Paints, Interiors

acceptanceCriteria: All six service cards are rendered in a responsive grid
'Get Free Quote' button on each card scrolls to the quote section

requirements.text: Build the Product Catalog section with category filter tabs, a search input, and a grid of product cards. Each product card shows image, category badge, description, and action buttons to inquire via WhatsApp or add to the enquiry basket. Display an InquiryBasket panel when items are selected.
acceptanceCriteria: Category filter and search input filter products in real time
Products can be added to and removed from the enquiry basket
InquiryBasket panel appears when at least one item is selected
WhatsApp enquiry opens a pre-filled chat link

requirements.text: Build the Premium Quote Builder section where users select rooms and a quality tier (Essential / Premium / Luxury) to receive an estimated interior project cost range, then send the quote details via WhatsApp. Show 'Not Applicable' for entire home furniture packages below ₹8,00,000.

quotes: 'Not Applicable' shown for entire home furniture below ₹8,00,000

acceptanceCriteria: Room selection and quality tier inputs update the cost estimate dynamically
Packages below ₹8,00,000 for entire home show 'Not Applicable'
WhatsApp button sends the full quote summary

requirements.text: Build the Pricing section with three tiers — Essential, Premium, and Luxury — each rendered as a pricing card with features list, price range, and a CTA button. The most popular tier should be visually highlighted.
acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing tier cards are displayed in a responsive grid
The most popular tier is visually distinguished
CTA button on each card scrolls to the quote section

requirements.text: Build the Gallery section with a 3-column image grid where clicking an image opens a full-screen lightbox with previous/next navigation, keyboard support (arrow keys and Escape), and an image caption.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery renders images in a 3-column responsive grid
Lightbox opens on image click with full-screen view
Arrow keys navigate between images; Escape closes the lightbox

requirements.text: Build the Contractor Zone section targeting contractors, displaying four partnership benefits (bulk pricing, fast delivery, quality, support) alongside a contractor inquiry form that collects name, phone, company, project type, and message, then opens a WhatsApp chat with the formatted details.
acceptanceCriteria: Four benefit cards are displayed alongside the inquiry form
Form validates required fields before submission
WhatsApp link opens with formatted contractor inquiry details

requirements.text: Build the Contact section displaying business info cards (phone, email, address, hours) alongside a Site Visit Booking Form (name, phone, address, preferred date/time, notes) and a Quick Estimate Form (name, phone, project type, budget, area). Both forms send details via WhatsApp. Block Quick Estimate submissions for full-home projects below the minimum budget.
acceptanceCriteria: Business info cards display phone, email, address, and hours
Site visit booking form sends details via WhatsApp on submit
Quick estimate form blocks low-budget full-home submissions with a clear message

requirements.text: Add a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner with an animated ping indicator that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to number 919588046569.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating button is always visible in the bottom-right corner
Clicking opens WhatsApp chat to 919588046569 in a new tab
Animated ping indicator is visible

requirements.text: Build the fixed top Navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to all page sections, company name and phone number CTA pulled from business settings, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
acceptanceCriteria: All nav links scroll smoothly to their respective sections
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Company name and phone number are displayed in the navbar

requirements.text: Build the site Footer displaying the company logo, quick navigation links, and contact details (phone, email, address) with a copyright bar at the bottom.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays logo, nav links, and contact details
Copyright bar is shown at the bottom of the footer

requirements.text: Build the PIN-protected Admin Panel (PIN: 2580) with tabs for managing products (add/edit/delete), business settings (company name, phone, email, address, hours), and WhatsApp message templates with a live preview editor.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is accessible only after entering PIN 2580
Products can be added, edited, and deleted via the admin panel
Business settings changes are persisted to the backend
WhatsApp message templates can be edited with placeholder tokens and previewed live

requirements.text: Implement the backend Motoko actor with data models and endpoints for: product catalog (CRUD), business settings (contact info, WhatsApp templates), and role-based access control for admin operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Product catalog supports create, read, update, and delete operations
Business settings can be fetched and updated
Admin operations are protected by access control

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: No payment processing or e-commerce checkout
No real-time chat or WebSocket features
No third-party authentication other than Internet Identity

required: Luxury interior showroom with warm lighting, wooden panels and premium furniture for hero background (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Plywood stacks and timber sheets in a hardware store setting (service-plywood.dim_600x400.png)
Metal hardware components including hinges, handles and screws on a white background (service-hardware.dim_600x400.png)
Colorful laminate sheets fanned out showing various wood grain and solid color finishes (service-laminates.dim_600x400.png)
Modern electrical fittings and wiring accessories arranged neatly (service-electrical.dim_600x400.png)
Paint cans and color swatches in warm tones on a clean surface (service-paints.dim_600x400.png)
Finished luxury interior living room with modular furniture and elegant decor (service-interiors.dim_600x400.png)
Modern luxury kitchen with wooden cabinets and marble countertop (gallery-kitchen.dim_800x600.png)
Elegant wardrobe with sliding doors and interior shelving (gallery-wardrobe.dim_800x600.png)
Sophisticated living room interior with custom furniture and lighting (gallery-living.dim_800x600.png)
Premium bedroom interior with built-in storage and ambient lighting (gallery-bedroom.dim_800x600.png)
Modern office interior with wooden paneling and clean lines (gallery-office.dim_800x600.png)
Luxury bathroom with wooden vanity and premium fixtures (gallery-bathroom.dim_800x600.png)
Gold and white abstract logo mark for Mahaveer Plywood company (logo-icon.dim_200x200.png)
